---
title: "Kevin Gonzalez"
subtitle: "Data Science & Software Engineering Portfolio"
---

## About Me

I am a Software Engineering student at Brigham Young University–Idaho (GPA 3.8) with experience in **web analytics**, **full-stack development**, **networking infrastructure**, and **AI-assisted systems**. I care about building reliable tools, analyzing user behavior, and turning messy data into clear decisions.

I currently work as a **Web Analytics Integration Programmer** and **Assistant Network Engineer** at BYU-Idaho, supporting campus digital experiences and network infrastructure for 2,000+ devices.

## What You'll Find Here

This portfolio showcases personal and professional projects outside of classroom homework, organized by skill area:

| Section | Focus |
|---------|--------|
| [My Resume](resume.qmd) | Full resume with education, experience, projects, and skills |
| [Data Cleansing](cleansing.qmd) | Cleaning messy data and preparing it for analysis |
| [Data Exploration](exploration.qmd) | Finding patterns and insights in structured data |
| [Story Telling](story_telling.qmd) | Communicating findings with clear visuals and narrative |
| [Machine Learning](ml.qmd) | Models, AI workflows, and evaluation pipelines |
| [Full Stack](full_stack.qmd) | End-to-end web applications and APIs |
| [Competitions](competition.qmd) | Hackathons and challenge projects |

## Featured Projects (newest first)

1. **PromptTrace** (Feb 2026) — AI prompt evaluation pipeline on AWS  
2. **Apollo 11 Simulator** (Mar 2026) — C++ real-time simulation with unit tests  
3. **Rexy's Voice** (Nov 2024) — Full-stack Node.js / MongoDB app for user interaction data  
4. **Course Recommendation Web App** (2024) — Full-stack course recommender  

## Connect

- Email: [gon22043@byui.edu](mailto:gon22043@byui.edu)
- LinkedIn: [kevin-gonzalez-](https://linkedin.com/in/kevin-gonzalez-)
- GitHub: [kevingonmed](https://github.com/kevingonmed)
- Location: Rexburg, ID
